title: Bare Bones x Refurbished Furniture
description: Bare Bones textures for Refurbished Furniture mod ! 🪑
body:
![Bare Bones x Refurbished Furniture logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/224962b7a51b841aa9d6a439b1a2685a3ea7e8b6.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures for [MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture) !

- This resource pack is contained in [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) ! It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs
